steps.title: Use the vertical angle first
steps.content: The angle vertical to the given $58^\circ$ angle also measures $58^\circ$, because vertical angles are congruent.

steps.title: Use same-side interior angles
steps.content:
That $58^\circ$ angle and the angle measuring $y^\circ$ are same-side interior angles between parallel lines $q$ and $r$, so they are supplementary:
$$58+y=180$$
$$y=122$$
